comment: 1. CRP (Constant Replacement)    — caught the 22050Hz→16000Hz DATA BREACH class
2. ROR (Relational Operator Replacement) — TerminalPhaseDetector compound conditions
3. LCR (Logical Connector Replacement)   — FalsePositiveGuard AND/OR boundaries
4. UOI (Unary Operator Insertion)        — AcousticProfileLibrary negation faults
Per-commit: mutate only changed files (use --mutate flag with tia-select output)
Nightly:    full mutation run on all 7 safety-critical modules
Pre-W-complete: mutation score must be ≥80% on TerminalPhaseDetector + FalsePositiveGuard
